notes: Blueprint .sbpcfg iconID and save mBlueprintCategoryRecords[].IconID both point to this FGIconLibrary ID space.
Blueprint subcategory records do not contain IconID in the inspected save.
The game may filter which icon types are selectable in the category UI; save/category records can store any integer IconID from this library, pending in-game validation.
Icon metadata and preview assets are extracted into this repository. Runtime does not require the game install, pak files, Oodle, or CUE4Parse.
